Introduction.en: Arbiter-X is an advanced zombie equipped with decision-making systems, making it unpredictable and highly dangerous.
Introduction.zh: 仲裁者-X 配备了先进的决策系统，使其行动难以预测且极其危险。

DESCRIPTION.en: changes behavior based on plant positions
DESCRIPTION.zh: 根据植物位置改变行为

Chat.en: Arbiter-X processes tactical data at inhuman speeds. Some say it's too intelligent for its own good, but it doesn't care what anyone thinks.
Chat.zh: 仲裁者-X 能以超人的速度处理战术数据。有人说它聪明得离谱，但它根本不在乎别人的想法。

Introduction.en: Skunk Punk Zombie brings rebellious attitude and noxious fumes to the battlefield, disrupting your plant formations.
Introduction.zh: 朋克臭鼬僵尸以其叛逆态度和刺鼻气味上阵，破坏你的植物阵容。

DESCRIPTION.en: emits toxic fumes that damage plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 散发有毒气体伤害植物

Chat.en: Skunk Punk doesn't follow anyone's rules but his own. He's here to make a stink, literally and figuratively.
Chat.zh: 朋克臭鼬只遵循自己的规则。他来这里就是为了制造麻烦，字面意思和引申意思都是。

Introduction.en: Zombot Drone Engineer commands mechanical swarms from above, raining destruction upon your defenses with robotic precision.
Introduction.zh: 僵尸无人机工程师从空中指挥机械群体，用机器人般的精准摧毁你的防线。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 部署无人机群发动攻击
无人机可绕过地面防御

Chat.en: The Zombot Drone Engineer is a master of air combat. With his mechanical swarms, he turns the sky itself into a weapon.
Chat.zh: 僵尸无人机工程师是空战大师。凭借他的机械群体，他把天空本身变成了武器。
